ddls:
CREATE TABLE "text_types" (
  "text_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text type */,
  "text_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the text type (e.g., New York Times Article, Shakespeare Sonnets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the text type */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the text type is archived and no longer used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the text type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the text type was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the text type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the text type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_corpora" (
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text corpus */,
  "text_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text type of the corpus */,
  "corpus_title" TEXT /* Title of the text corpus */,
  "corpus_content" TEXT /* Content of the text corpus */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the corpus was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the corpus */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the corpus is active and available for analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the corpus */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the corpus was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the corpus */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the corpus was last modified */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the corpus (e.g., website, book, journal) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the corpus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_corpora_text_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_type_id") REFERENCES text_types ("text_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text corpus the metric belongs to */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Value of n used in the analysis */,
  "k" INTEGER /* Value of k used in the analysis */,
  "uninterpolated_score" REAL /* Uninterpolated score of the text corpus */,
  "interpolated_score" REAL /* Interpolated score of the text corpus */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., readability, complexity) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metric */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_metrics_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES text_corpora ("corpus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, content creator, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text corpus being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the text corpus */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the text corpus was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES text_corpora ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corpus_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text corpus the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the corpus */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is a draft */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corpus_versions_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corpus_versions_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES text_corpora ("corpus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, content creator, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_corpora, upload_corpora) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the permission */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corpus_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text corpus the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the comment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corpus_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corpus_comments_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES text_corpora ("corpus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corpus_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text corpus the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., author, publication_date) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metadata entry is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metadata entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corpus_metadata_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES text_corpora ("corpus_id")
)
